user.title: Fulgero account
user.description: Get a free API key on the Fulgero site (fulgero.ro) — email verification; the key is shown once.

target.title: Connection point
target.description: Your distribution zone (see your invoice), supplier offer, and voltage level (households: JT).

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the Fulgero API — check the base URL and your network.
error.invalid_auth: The API rejected the key (revoked or mistyped?).
error.empty_catalog: The key is valid but the API returned no offers — try again later.

abort.already_configured: This zone/offer/voltage combination is already configured.
